positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a whimsical forest scene at twilight. Focus on large, overlapping botanical elements: giant glowing mushrooms, silhouetted birch trees with delicate leaf patterns, and meandering rivers suggested by gentle cyan washes. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau fluidity and modern kawaii geometry, rendered with highly saturated, jewel-toned colors (deep emerald, sapphire blue, amethyst purple) that maintain high contrast against black negative space. The composition must be circular and centrally focused, designed as a seamless repeating pattern for apparel print. Use clean, bold lines and deep, moody shadows. Full bleed, vector art quality, high detail, maximum contrast.
negative: blur, oversaturated, low detail, watermark, text, signature, messy, complex background, gradient noise, low contrast, photorealism, grain, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy
